race.comment: Pretty even with many of these coming through the same race on the turf behind Sir Jag. LAST TREMBLE (6) comes through that race and kept coming to finish fourth. Close here the start prior and looks suited by the longer trip. JUST BOBBY (2) has been freshened since giving a sight last time over 2040m. Racing well and expected to be in this for a long way. TIZSA NICE DROP (10) has been kept fresh since finishing fourth here last time in the same race that LAST TREMBLE placed in two back. Best form is here and expected to relish the longer journey. NORTHERN CHILD (4) was gassed from a wide gate last time in the Sir Jag race when forced to go feared and well worth another chance.
